nodes.label: Presentation Plan Gating (Pro/Org only)
nodes.rationale: Hard requirement from product — free users cannot access presentations; sidebar item shows Pro badge and click opens upgrade modal.

nodes.label: Presentation Slide Cap (20 max, default 10)
nodes.rationale: Predictable generation scope. Range 5-20 in UI.

nodes.label: Presentation Block ID Format (short sequential)
nodes.rationale: LLM-friendly for chat-edit prompts and easy to debug.

nodes.label: Presentation Structured Output (OpenAI strict mode)
nodes.rationale: Claude tool use as fallback. Backend decision, FE unaffected.
